message:
fix(abi): migrate signal_abi.rs to raw syscalls

Migrates all 15 libc::syscall calls to native raw syscalls:
- sys_kill for raise, kill, killpg
- sys_rt_sigprocmask for sigprocmask, sighold, sigrelse
- sys_rt_sigaction for sigaction, siginterrupt, sigignore
- sys_rt_sigpending for sigpending
- sys_rt_sigtimedwait for sigwait
- sys_rt_sigsuspend for sigsuspend
- sys_sigaltstack for sigaltstack
- sys_pause for pause

Adds 8 new signal syscall wrappers to frankenlibc-core.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
